headline: Analysts Express Mixed Sentiment on Devon Energy (DVN)
summary: Devon Energy Corporation (NYSE:DVN) is included among the 12 Most Undervalued Natural Gas Stocks to Buy Now. Devon Energy Corporation (NYSE:DVN) is a leading independent energy company engaged in finding and producing oil and natural gas, with operations focused onshore in the United States. On April 14, UBS slightly reduced its price target on Devon […]
